# DataList

Presents label/value pairs as an aligned definition list.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/data-list
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="data-list"
  example={0}
  code={`<DataList.Root>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>Status</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>
      <Badge tone="success" variant="subtle">Authorized</Badge>
    </DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>ID</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value><Code>u_2J89JSA4GJ</Code></DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>Name</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Ada Lovelace</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>Email</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value><Link href="mailto:ada@example.com">ada@example.com</Link></DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
</DataList.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<DataList.Root>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>Status</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>
      <Badge tone="success" variant="subtle">
        Authorized
      </Badge>
    </DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>ID</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>
      <Code>u_2J89JSA4GJ</Code>
    </DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>Name</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Ada Lovelace</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label>Email</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>
      <Link href="mailto:ada@example.com">ada@example.com</Link>
    </DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
</DataList.Root>
```

  slug="data-list"
  example={1}

  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label tone="accent">Accent</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Primary brand palette</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>

    <DataList.Value>Operation completed</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label tone="danger">Danger</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Action required</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
</DataList.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<DataList.Root orientation="vertical">
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label tone="accent">Accent</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Primary brand palette</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label tone="success">Success</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Operation completed</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
  <DataList.Item>
    <DataList.Label tone="danger">Danger</DataList.Label>
    <DataList.Value>Action required</DataList.Value>
  </DataList.Item>
</DataList.Root>
```

## Props

### `<DataList.Label>`

| Prop   | Type           | Required | Default | Description                                                              |
| ------ | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `tone` | `DataListTone` | No       | -       | Tint the label with a semantic tone. Defaults to the muted neutral text. |

### `<DataList.Root>`

| Prop          | Type                  | Required | Default | Description                                                                        |
| ------------- | --------------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `orientation` | `DataListOrientation` | No       | -       | Lay each label/value pair side by side (\`horizontal\`) or stacked (\`vertical\`). |
| `size`        | `DataListSize`        | No       | -       | Text scale applied to labels and values.                                           |

## Variants

| Variant       | Values                   |
| ------------- | ------------------------ |
| `orientation` | `horizontal`, `vertical` |
| `size`        | `sm`, `md`, `lg`         |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/data-list.json`
- Recipe: `dataList`
- Files: `src/components/ui/data-list.tsx`
